title: Software Engineer at Verily
subtitle: Full-time chapter beginning in 2023
summary: The current long-running chapter: product engineering, system ownership, and the part of the graph that connects most directly back to the present-day bio node.

detail.text: Compared with the earlier nodes, this one reflects a steadier and less school-shaped rhythm. It is about longer projects, production responsibility, and a deeper engineering identity that can later branch into writing, side projects, or future moves.

items: Continuation of the Verily internship into a full-time role
Represents the most up-to-date experience thread in the graph
A natural bridge back to the central bio node and present tense
